proof_steps.natural_language:
We assume:
‚ÄĘ Let n be a natural number. u and v are sequences of n nonnegative real numbers [tc_1].
‚ÄĘ p is a real number such that p > 1 [tc_2].
Therefore, we conclude:
‚ÄĘ ‚ąĎ_{i=1}^n (u_i+v_i)^p = ‚ąĎ_{i=1}^n u_i(u_i+v_i)^(p-1) + ‚ąĎ_{i=1}^n v_i(u_i+v_i)^(p-1) [l1].

    calc
